author: Undisclosed
title: Good but needs time to see better results
body: Good but needs time to see better results After using this product for about 3/4 weeks I can see some improvement on my skin. It helped with the redness I see some improvement in the discolouration and texture as well.Packaging is amazing feels luxurious and the serum has a bit of a scent and glow to it which I liked and didn't make my skin react. The glow does go away after applying the rest of my skincare but my skin is going thru dry season so that can be why. And regarding hydration and plumpness don't see much a difference specially because my skin is super dry now. I didn't notice any difference with wrinkles and fine lines but I think you need to use it for a few months in order so see some improvement. It is a nice serum overall but might take a while to see full results. Share รีวิวนี้มีประโยชน์กับคุณ? 0 0

author: A**
title: Hydrate and smooth fine lines
body: Hydrate and smooth fine lines I am in my 30s, have very dry skin that my face is often peeling in dry weather. While this is not the most moisturizing cream, my face easily sucks in the cream, lock in moisture, and leave a non-greasy natural finish for most of the day. It feels like my skin is pumped with collagen. I can feel the difference literally after first use following the serum+moisturizer+eye cream of this pink line. I used to reach for estee lauder serum/ creams to rescue my peeling face during the autumn/winter period, and I'm glad to find this more affordable option with the sales going on now. No smell or perfume as far as I can tell. Share รีวิวนี้มีประโยชน์กับคุณ? 0 0
